name: Patient 12
history: PhD student in science field with deep music involvement. Previously led college band, currently in jazz group. Declined leadership position. Feels disconnected from scientific colleagues.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I don't fit in anywhere - not in science, not fully in music.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm fragmented between different identities and good at neither.
coping_strategies: Musical engagement, avoidance of leadership roles.
situation: Experiencing difficulty during jazz rehearsals, requiring repeated attempts.
auto_thought: Even in music, I'm struggling. Maybe I'm not good at anything.
behavior: Struggle through jazz rehearsals with repeated attempts.
